positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic, smiling celestial creature—a cosmic fox. The creature has flowing, glowing tails and ears, and its body should be rendered in clean, deep indigo and gold ink-like gradients. It is set against a subtle, ethereal nebula background of muted teal and lavender. Composition should feature a central, powerful silhouette with high contrast and clean lines, designed to look excellent as a repeat pattern or single print on apparel. Vector art style, high contrast line work, thick outlines, geometric simplicity, pop art influence, perfect symmetry, centered.
